data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): T4 must not assume resolve_hierarchy_link() exposes 'level' directly. After S2's resolve_hierarchy_link() call returns the resolved (source_id, target_id) pair, determine the level by calling _reduce_ticket() on the resolved source ticket dir and reading state.get('ticket_type', '').lower(). Only call check_cycle_at_level when this ticket_type is non-empty. Fail-open: if ticket_type is empty, skip check_cycle_at_level. Add criterion: - [ ] When resolved source ticket_type is empty string, add_dependency() proceeds normally without calling check_cycle_at_level. Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py::test_add_dependency_skips_cycle_check_when_no_type -x
